Container.Name: scrutiny
Container.Overview: Hard Drive S.M.A.R.T Monitoring, Historical Trends and Real World Failure Thresholds. Scrutiny is a hard drive health dashboard and monitoring solution, merging manufacturer-provided S.M.A.R.T metrics with real-world failure rates from Backblaze. Includes web dashboard, metrics collector, and InfluxDB in a single container. You must add each drive as a Device in the container settings. Alternatively, toggle Privileged mode to ON in the Unraid Docker UI to grant access to all drives automatically (less secure).

Config.Name: InfluxDB Port
Config.Description: InfluxDB admin port. Only needed if you want direct access to InfluxDB.

Config.Name: Udev
Config.Description: Required for device detection. Do not change.

Config.Name: Disk 1
Config.Description: First disk to monitor. Add more Device entries for additional disks. For NVMe, pass both /dev/nvme0 (controller) and /dev/nvme0n1 (namespace).

Config.Name: Cron Schedule
Config.Description: S.M.A.R.T data collection schedule (cron format). Default: daily at midnight.

Config.Name: Run on Startup
Config.Description: Run S.M.A.R.T data collection immediately on container startup.

Config.Name: MQTT Enabled
Config.Description: Enable Home Assistant MQTT Discovery. Drives will auto-appear in Home Assistant.

Config.Name: MQTT Broker
Config.Description: MQTT broker URL (e.g. tcp://mosquitto:1883). Required when MQTT is enabled.
